name: security-threat-model
title: Threat Model Source Code Repo
summary: Repository-grounded threat modeling that enumerates trust boundaries, assets, attacker capabilities, abuse paths, and mitigations, and writes a concise Markdown threat model. Trigger only when the user explicitly asks to threat model a codebase or path, enumerate threats/abuse paths, or perform AppSec threat modeling. Do not trigger for general architecture summaries, code review, or non-security design work.

category.l1: B. 工程实现与质量保障
category.l3: B3-1. 安全审查与问题定位

recommended_action: 纳入重复组人工复核，必要时合并
